segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens in a tense talk show setting, with the male host, in a black shirt against a brick wall backdrop featuring a large 'm' logo, introducing the blonde woman, Katherine, to enthusiastic audience applause. He then introduces the dark-haired woman, Anhelica, seated beside Katherine on a beige couch, also to a round of applause. The host dramatically reveals that a little over two years ago, Katherine gave birth to a baby boy named Manuel, and two weeks later, Anhelica gave birth to a baby girl named Alicia. The audience gasps audibly as the host states these two women share more than just friendship, and their children might have the same father, a man named Escardo, while the on-screen text reads, 'THESE TEEN GIRLS ARE WRONG... THEIR BABIES ARE NOT MINE!'. The host emphasizes that Escardo denies paternity for both children, prompting loud boos from the audience. The young man, Escardo, with a goatee and striped shirt, appears on screen, confidently asserting, "Not my kids, none!" and later, "I got no kids." He further claims that he and Katherine have always had an on-and-off relationship, and every time they break up, she sleeps with other guys. The camera frequently cuts between the host's emphatic gestures, the emotional and defensive women, and the diverse audience displaying varied reactions from shock to amusement. The segment culminates in a dramatic split-screen featuring Escardo and Katherine, with the lighting shifting to intense red and orange hues, heightening the emotional stakes of the paternity conflict.

segments.integrated_caption: The dramatic talk show set, with its brick wall backdrop and warm red lighting, frames the Male Host in a navy blue zip-up as he confronts his guests about a cheating scandal. On-screen text initially poses the question: 'DID MY MAN CHEAT WITH MY TEEN SISTER? TEST THEM!'. Samantha, in a magenta top, sits beside Kalain, in a blue shirt, while Toneisha (Samantha’s sister), visibly distressed in a vibrant floral top, watches. The Male Host, with a clear and commanding voice, reveals the lie detector results, stating, "lie detector determined you're telling the truth," which aligns with the on-screen text that reads: 'THE TEST DETERMINED NOTHING HAPPENED THE NIGHT SAMANTHA SAW KALAIN WITH HER SISTER' and 'THE TEST DETERMINED TONEISHA NEVER HAD SEX WITH HER SISTER'S BOYFRIEND.' Samantha, highly emotional and vindicated, exclaims, "I told you!" and "You got me way out here for that. I told you, man," as the audience erupts in cheers and applause. The Male Host further clarifies, "By the way, Samantha, just to make this thing really real, we also tested Toneisha and what she said also means that she never had anything to do with your boyfriend." This second reveal, confirming Toneisha's innocence, causes Kalain to stand abruptly and Toneisha to rise, covering her face in emotion. Samantha, still passionate, confronts Kalain with a loud, "You owe me, man! You owe me! You told me, why? I had to tell the whole show the fool that I love you. I had to come up here and prove that I love you. Why would you thank me?" Kalain quietly responds, "I'm sorry, I'm sorry." The Male Host gestures emphatically, pointing toward the screens as the on-screen text updates to 'SAMANTHA NOW KNOWS THAT KALAIN HAS CHEATED, BUT NOT WITH HER SISTER.' Toneisha and Samantha embrace tearfully, sharing a moment of relief and reconciliation amidst the charged atmosphere of emotional release, underscored by the studio’s dramatic lighting and the audience’s continued audible reactions of shock and applause. The Male Host attempts to continue, "Samantha, I want you to meet back..." before the segment ends.

The Male Host, wearing a red sweater, then appears, speaking with urgency and gesturing, introducing the case with on-screen text: '2 TEEN COUSINS...2 BABIES... IS BONIFASIO THE FATHER?' He continues his voiceover, explaining Tonya 'cheated one time' and Ronnie 'never did forgive her.' The camera returns to Tonya, tears streaming down her face, her expression one of anguish, as she begins to speak through sobs, stating, 'For seven years, I have loved and devoted my life to Ronnie.' A montage follows, showing split-screen images of two young children, Persais and Emerald, with their names displayed. Tonya's emotional voice continues, explaining her heart is 'broken because he doesn't think my four-year-old Emerald and my two-year-old Persais is his,' admitting she 'cheated on Ronnie' once, 'three years before our first daughter was born.' The children’s faces are shown in close-up, one pouting and the other smiling, before merging into a composite image with Tonya behind them, as the lighting shifts dramatically to red and dark tones. On-screen text initially reads '2 TEEN COUSINS...2 BABIES... IS BONIFASIO THE FATHER?' as the Male Host questions Ronnie about the children, asking if he'd be a good father and if he and Tonya would get back together, to which Ronnie briefly responds 'Yeah.' Tonya, visibly distressed, interjects, 'Didn't act like it.' The Male Host continues, noting that children don't have to 'look Mexican' to be someone's, prompting Ronnie to state, 'They don't look nothing like me.' The on-screen text then shifts to 'RONNIE IS ABOUT TO FIND OUT IF HE FATHERED TONYA'S 2 CHILDREN.' The on-screen text changes to 'YOU ARE THE FATHER!' as Ronnie reacts with shock and resignation, leaning forward and raising his arms. Tonya screams, covering her face, repeatedly exclaiming, 'I told you! I told you!' as they embrace tightly, both overwhelmed with emotion. The Male Host then announces the results for four-year-old Emerald: 'Ronnie, you are the father!' leading to more audience cheers and Tonya's continued emotional outburst, crying 'I told you!' and questioning, 'Is she too white? The final on-screen text confirms, 'THE DNA TESTS JUST PROVED THAT RONNIE FATHERED BOTH OF TONYA'S KIDS,' as the camera captures their emotional embrace and the Male Host’s stunned reaction, with the large screen behind them displaying images of the children.
